flared-micro-print-anarkali-kurti.name: Flared Micro-Print Anarkali Kurti
flared-micro-print-anarkali-kurti.desc: Flared Micro-Print Anarkali Kurti: A black fit-and-flare ethnic dress featuring an all-over cream geometric micro-booti block print, designed with a buttoned front placket, 3/4 sleeves, and adjustable side dori tie-ups adorned with stacked triangular fabric tassels.

ajrakh-modal-kurti.name: Ajrakh Modal Kurti
ajrakh-modal-kurti.desc: This hand block-printed kurti is crafted on breathable cotton using traditional Rajasthani printing techniques. Each piece is unique with slight variations that reflect its handcrafted nature.

elegant-floral-v-neck-kurti.name: Elegant Floral V-Neck Kurti
elegant-floral-v-neck-kurti.desc: Elegant Floral V-Neck Kurti: This off-white kurti features a graceful, all-over floral and botanical print in muted teal and rust tones. Its sophisticated V-neckline and sleeve cuffs are highlighted by intricate embroidery and shimmering sequin embellishments, making it perfect for refined everyday elegance.

angrakha-style-patchwork-kurti.name: Angrakha Style Patchwork Kurti
angrakha-style-patchwork-kurti.desc: Angrakha Style Patchwork Kurti: A contemporary lime green straight kurti featuring an asymmetrical crossover neckline, intricate maroon peacock-motif patchwork, and traditional mirror-work borders.

sleeveless-panelled-paisley-kurti.name: Sleeveless Panelled Paisley Kurti
sleeveless-panelled-paisley-kurti.desc: Sleeveless Panelled Paisley Kurti: A casual straight kurti featuring a distinct three-panel vertical design with a jet black central panel flanked by deep rose-pink side panels. It is designed with a classic sleeveless cut, a simple round neckline with narrow contrasting piping, and an all-over traditional cream paisley (keri) block print.

dual-pattern-lace-kurti.name: Dual-Pattern Lace Kurti
dual-pattern-lace-kurti.desc: Asymmetric Dual-Pattern Lace Kurti: A contemporary straight-fit kurti featuring a striking diagonal panel division accentuated by a delicate white crochet lace trim. Designed with a soft V-neckline, comfortable 3/4 sleeves with contrast cuff borders, and a mixed ethnic block print layout combining a dusty maroon geometric pattern on one side with a structured jet-black ogival frame print on the other.

lace-trimmed-block-print-kurti.name: Lace-Trimmed Block Print Kurti
lace-trimmed-block-print-kurti.desc: Lace-Trimmed Block Print Kurti: An asymmetric straight kurti featuring a diagonal panel division of jet-black and rust-maroon traditional micro-block prints, accented with ochre highlights and highlighted by a white crochet lace trim.

angrakha-style-patchwork-kurti-2.name: Angrakha-Style Patchwork Kurti
angrakha-style-patchwork-kurti-2.desc:
Angrakha-Style Patchwork Kurti
A traditional jet-black angrakha kurti featuring a faux wrap front with side tie-ups, accented by blue mirror-work trims and a vertical geometric layout of rust and gold block-printed patches.

olive-mustard-botanical-two-piece-suit.name: Olive-Mustard Botanical Two-Piece Suit
olive-mustard-botanical-two-piece-suit.desc:
Olive-Mustard Botanical Two-Piece Suit
Co-Ord Ensemble: A matching two-piece set consisting of a vibrant olive-mustard kurti featuring a white botanical print and an embellished neckline, paired with solid trousers.

sage-green-kalamkari-patchwork-kurti.name: Sage Green Kalamkari Patchwork Kurti
sage-green-kalamkari-patchwork-kurti.desc:
Sage Green Kalamkari Patchwork Kurti
Artisanal Patchwork: A calm sage green kurti featuring an intricately detailed Kalamkari printed yoke and matching flared sleeve cuffs.
Classic Silhouette: Designed as a straight-cut tunic with practical 3/4 sleeves, offering a comfortable and elegant daily wear option.

elegant-navy-blue-two-pice-set.name: Elegant navy blue two pice set
elegant-navy-blue-two-pice-set.desc:
Elegant navy blue co-ord set crafted with subtle woven motifs, offering a perfect blend of comfort and sophistication.
Flowy wide-leg pants and a stylish sleeveless top create a modern ethnic look ideal for casual outings and festive gatherings
elegant-navy-blue-two-pice-set.img: Kurti_pic/Elegant navy blue two pice set.jpeg

maroon-ethnic-fusion-kurti.name: Maroon Ethnic Fusion Kurti
maroon-ethnic-fusion-kurti.desc:
Maroon Ethnic Fusion Kurti
​This maroon kurti features elegant block-print patchwork and a stylish wrap-around neckline with decorative trim. Its versatile design perfectly balances traditional elements with a modern, cool aesthetic.

vibrant-pink-ethnic-fusion-kurti.name: Vibrant Pink Ethnic Fusion Kurti
vibrant-pink-ethnic-fusion-kurti.desc:
Vibrant Pink Ethnic Fusion Kurti
This vibrant pink kurti highlights a bold, central black panel adorned with intricate geometric and paisley patterns. Its modern fusion design pairs traditional motifs with a contemporary, stylish silhouette, perfect for a chic and confident look.

olive-green-and-maroon-kurti.name: Olive green and maroon kurti
olive-green-and-maroon-kurti.desc:
Chic Ethnic Fusion
This image features a stylish model wearing a modern, knee-length olive green and maroon kurti adapted .The outfit is elevated with contemporary styling elements, including a matching maroon leather crossbody bag, statement silver earrings, and elegant tan block-heel sandals.

half-sleeve-brownish-maroon-kurti.name: Half sleeve brownish maroon kurti
half-sleeve-brownish-maroon-kurti.desc:
Half sleeve brownish maroon kurti
This look pairs the sleeveless plum kurti with matching straight-fit pants to create a cohesive, elongated silhouette. The outfit is styled with a coordinated leather crossbody bag and minimalist block heels for a contemporary ethnic look.

deep-bottle-green-chanderi-kurti.name: Deep bottle-green chanderi kurti
deep-bottle-green-chanderi-kurti.desc:
Deep bottle-green chanderi kurti
featuring an elegant V-neckline embellished with traditional mirror work and an intricate rust-printed border. The stylish ensemble is seamlessly completed with a structured tan crossbody bag, geometric statement earrings, and contemporary block-heel sandals.

white-kurti-with-ivory-elegance.name: White kurti with Ivory Elegance
white-kurti-with-ivory-elegance.desc:
White kurti with Ivory Elegance
delicate gold foil leaf motifs and subtle embroidery along the notched neckline and cuffs. The look is styled for a chic, contemporary aesthetic by pairing it with casual light-wash denim jeans, a tan leather crossbody bag, and classic leather juttis.

mustard-yellow-kurti.name: Mustard-yellow kurti
mustard-yellow-kurti.desc:
Mustard-yellow kurti
detailed all-over paisley and floral block print with distinct green piping around the neckline. The pretty look is completed by pairing the outfit with crisp white cropped trousers, a woven straw handbag, and decorated ethnic juttis.

sleeveless-charcoal-grey-anarkali-kurti.name: Sleeveless charcoal-grey anarkali Kurti
sleeveless-charcoal-grey-anarkali-kurti.desc:
Sleeveless charcoal-grey anarkali Kurti
all-over intricate paisley and floral block-print pattern. The pretty model strikes a cool, dynamic pose while leaning against a pillar, highlighting the dress's flowy silhouette and delicate waist-tie tassels. The bohemian look is styled with layered gold necklaces, hoop earrings, and brown strappy lace-up sandals.

elegant-ajrakh-print-knee-length-kurti.name: Elegant Ajrakh print knee-length kurti
elegant-ajrakh-print-knee-length-kurti.desc:
Elegant, knee-length kurti
all-over intricate geometric Ajrakh print paired with a contrasting crimson patterned yoke. The pretty model strikes a cool, relaxed pose leaning against a stone pillar, perfectly highlighting the dress's tailored fit, side pockets, and striking paisley-motif hemline border. The look is effortlessly completed with stacked bracelets, gold hoop earrings, and casual brown braided slide sandals.

chanderi-silk-saree.name: Chanderi Silk Saree
chanderi-silk-saree.desc: Handwoven in Madhya Pradesh, this Chanderi silk saree features a gossamer-light weave with delicate zari borders and traditional motifs. The soft drape makes it perfect for festivals, weddings, and cultural gatherings.

banarasi-silk-saree.name: Banarasi Silk Saree
banarasi-silk-saree.desc: Rich Banarasi silk saree featuring intricate brocade weaving in gold and crimson threads with a complementary sheer pallu with scalloped zari borders. Perfect for weddings and festive occasions.

floral-cotton-nighty.name: Floral Cotton Nighty
floral-cotton-nighty.desc: A comfortable full-length nighty in lightweight cotton featuring delicate floral prints in soft blush and mauve tones. The relaxed silhouette and breathable fabric make it ideal for year-round wear.

linen-maxi-nighty.name: Linen Maxi Nighty
linen-maxi-nighty.desc: Crafted from 100% washed linen, this maxi nighty offers unmatched comfort with a touch of elegance. Features subtle pintuck details and a relaxed fit. Available in natural beige, sage, and dusty rose.

churidar-legins.name: Churidar Legins
churidar-legins.desc: Classic churidar-style legins in soft stretch cotton blend. The tapered fit and gathering at the ankle create the traditional churidar look. Pairs beautifully with kurtis and tunics. Available in black, navy, and maroon.

palazzo-legins.name: Palazzo Legins
palazzo-legins.desc: Flowy palazzo-style legins in lightweight fabric with a comfortable elasticated waist. The wide-leg silhouette pairs beautifully with fitted kurtis and crop tops. Available in ivory, blush, and deep burgundy.

embroidered-saree-blouse.name: Embroidered Saree Blouse
embroidered-saree-blouse.desc: A beautifully crafted saree blouse featuring hand-done embroidery with thread and sequin work on the front and back yoke. Deep back with hook closures. Custom stitching available on request.

silk-printed-blouse.name: Silk Printed Blouse
silk-printed-blouse.desc: A versatile silk blouse featuring an all-over traditional motif print in rich jewel tones. The classic cut with three-quarter sleeves and a rounded neckline pairs effortlessly with both traditional and contemporary sarees.
